detail.description: LuJames Groover grounds out, third baseman David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers.

LuJames Groover singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jacob Young. Pavin Smith scores. LuJames Groover to 3rd. LuJames Groover advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Jacob Young.
